channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Three women killed in occupied West Bank missile attack
item.description: Three women in an occupied West Bank hair salon became the first Palestinian deaths of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Saudi FM warns Iran that patience in Gulf not ‘unlimited’ amid attacks
item.description: Foreign minister warns Iran that regional neighbours have 'significant' capabilities with which to respond to attacks.

item.title: Iran war live: Qatar, Saudi energy sites attacked; Riyadh says trust gone
item.description: Iranian strikes on Gulf energy come after Israel attacked Iran's South Pars gasfield and navy assets in the north.

item.title: Qatar expels Iranian attaches after LNG facility strike
item.description: Qatar is expelling Iran’s military and security attaches after Iranian missiles caused “extensive damage” to Ras Laffan.

item.title: Funerals held for Afghans killed in Pakistani strike on Kabul hospital
item.description: Afghans are burying the victims from a Pakistani air strike on a drug rehabilitation centre in Kabul.

item.title: At least eight killed as Brazilian police carry out lethal favela raid
item.description: Brazilian police say that raid in Rio de Janeiro targeted a leader of Red Command, a powerful criminal group.

item.title: What are Iran’s options as war goes on?
item.description: Tehran defiant as US and Israeli attacks continue.

item.title: Iranians burn Trump, Netanyahu effigies at warship victim rally
item.description: Iranians in Tehran burned effigies of Israeli PM Netanyahu and US President Trump.

item.title: US Fed keeps interest rates steady amid economic uncertainty, Iran war
item.description: The US Federal Reserve keeps rates steady at 3.5–3.75 percent amidst a cooling labour market and Iran pressures.

item.title: Oil prices surge after Israeli strike on Iran’s South Pars gasfield
item.description: There are fears that a period of elevated oil and gas prices could trigger a damaging wave of global inflation.
